data.body: CHECKPOINT 1+2: Read ticket e12e-aacc and both files. Current per-worktree-review-commit.md Step 6 has brief conflict handling (just 'Run git merge --abort. Flag for re-implementation. DO NOT remove worktree. Continue to next worktree.'). Tests verify: (1) merge abort succeeds and worktree retained, (2) non-conflicting worktrees continue after conflict abort, (3) conflicting worktree stays queued while successful ones are cleaned up. Need to expand Step 6 with: explicit conflict queue, ticket comment command, serialized re-implementation protocol.
